margin_percentage_description: Margin percentage is the percentage of the sale price that is profit. For example, if the margin percentage is 10%, the sale price will be 10% more than the purchase price or average cost.This will only applied if the sale price is not set.
print_barcode_description: Select items, set quantities, preview barcode labels, and print them.
add_product_placeholder: Type product name, code, or barcode...
preview_description: This area shows the barcode labels exactly as they will be printed.
no_barcode_items: Only items with a saved barcode can be printed.
no_items_selected: Add one or more items to preview barcode labels.
barcode_not_available: This item does not have a saved barcode.
barcode_total_limit_description: The combined quantity across all selected items cannot be more than {limit}. Remaining labels: {remaining}.
barcode_total_limit_error: The total number of barcode labels cannot exceed {limit}.
add_multiple_items_quickly: Add multiple items quickly. Use the “+” on the last row to append more.
remove_unwanted_items: Remove unwanted items using the “-” symbol.
duplicate_store_batch_expiry: This store with the same batch and expiry already exists.
sale_price_less_than_purchase_price: Sale price cannot be less than purchase price.
cost_and_purchase_price_required_descrip: Cost and Purchase Price are required for the opening of the item.
no_data_to_save: No data to save. Please fill at least one row.
is_batch_tracked_desc: Enable batch tracking for the item.
is_expiry_tracked_desc: Enable expiry tracking for the item.
opening_lock_warning_description: Some of the openings of this item are locked. Because this records are already in use and you can't edit them.
opening_warning_description: Be careful to enter real opening quantities. If you enter wrong quantities, you can't edit them after they are used.
opening_key_points_1: Be careful to enter real opening quantities.
opening_key_points_2: If you enter wrong quantities, you can't edit them after they are used.
opening_key_points_3: Be careful to select the correct warehouse.
batch_warning: If you enable batch tracking, you can't edit it once it is created.
expiry_warning: If you enable expiry tracking, you can't edit it once it is created.
